name: chrome-extension-builder-marketplace
description: A single-plugin marketplace that ships the Chrome Extension Builder plugin. Install with: /plugin marketplace add harry-harish/chrome-extension-builder && /plugin install chrome-extension-builder@chrome-extension-builder-marketplace

plugins.name: chrome-extension-builder
plugins.description: Use when scaffolding, validating, testing, or publishing a Manifest V3 Chrome/Edge/Firefox extension. Builds end-to-end with WXT, Plasmo, or CRXJS.
